build.beforeDevCommand: node scripts/gen-icons.js && node scripts/copy-assets.js && node scripts/prepare-ytdlp.js && node scripts/prepare-ocr-assets.js && node scripts/dev-server.js
build.beforeBuildCommand: node scripts/gen-icons.js && node scripts/copy-assets.js && node scripts/prepare-ytdlp.js && node scripts/prepare-ocr-assets.js

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube.com/iframe_api; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: data: https: blob: http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost; connect-src 'self' https://*.workers.dev https://raw.githubusercontent.com https://github.com https://api.telegram.org https://www.notion.so https://i.ytimg.com; media-src 'self' asset: data: https: blob: http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost; frame-src 'self' https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.longDescription: Save images and videos from anywhere on the web. Organize your creative inspiration locally with Qooti.
